reports.title: Documents
reports.query: MATCH (d:Document) RETURN count(d) AS documents

reports.title: Chunks
reports.query: MATCH (c:Chunk) RETURN count(c) AS chunks

reports.title: LINKS_TO edges
reports.query: MATCH ()-[r:LINKS_TO]->() RETURN count(r) AS links

reports.title: Docs without chunks (ingest gaps)
reports.query: MATCH (d:Document) WHERE NOT (d)-[:HAS_CHUNK]->(:Chunk) RETURN count(d) AS docs_without_chunks

reports.title: Documents by category (the steering dimension)
reports.query: MATCH (d:Document) RETURN coalesce(d.category, '(none)') AS category, count(*) AS docs ORDER BY docs DESC

reports.title: Top EMA doc_type (PDFs, finer than category)
reports.query: MATCH (d:Document) WHERE d.doc_type IS NOT NULL RETURN d.doc_type AS doc_type, count(*) AS docs ORDER BY docs DESC LIMIT 20

reports.title: Enrichment coverage by source_type (docs/RETRIEVAL.md §7)
reports.query: MATCH (d:Document) RETURN d.source_type AS source_type, count(*) AS docs, count(d.category) AS with_category, count(d.doc_type) AS with_doc_type, count(d.audience) AS with_audience, count(d.site_topic) AS with_site_topic ORDER BY docs DESC

reports.title: Edges by DOM context (boilerplate signature)
reports.query: MATCH ()-[r:LINKS_TO]->() RETURN coalesce(r.link_context, '(none)') AS context, count(*) AS edges ORDER BY edges DESC

reports.title: Edges by link kind
reports.query: MATCH ()-[r:LINKS_TO]->() RETURN coalesce(r.kind, '(none)') AS kind, count(*) AS edges ORDER BY edges DESC

reports.title: Top in-degree targets (chrome pages would dominate)
reports.query: MATCH (:Document)-[:LINKS_TO]->(b:Document) WITH b, count(*) AS in_edges ORDER BY in_edges DESC LIMIT 25 RETURN coalesce(b.title, b.source_url) AS target, b.category AS category, in_edges

reports.title: Most-repeated anchor texts (nav boilerplate fingerprint)
reports.query: MATCH ()-[r:LINKS_TO]->() WHERE r.anchor IS NOT NULL WITH r.anchor AS anchor, count(*) AS edges ORDER BY edges DESC LIMIT 25 RETURN anchor, edges

reports.title: Members per topic hub
reports.query: MATCH (d:Document) WHERE d.topic_hubs IS NOT NULL UNWIND d.topic_hubs AS hub RETURN hub, count(*) AS members ORDER BY members DESC

reports.title: Pick a hub
reports.query: MATCH (d:Document) WHERE d.topic_hubs IS NOT NULL UNWIND d.topic_hubs AS hub RETURN DISTINCT hub ORDER BY hub

reports.title: Composition of $neodash_hub_key
reports.query: MATCH (d:Document) WHERE $neodash_hub_key IN coalesce(d.topic_hubs, []) RETURN coalesce(d.category, '(none)') AS category, count(*) AS members ORDER BY members DESC

reports.title: Members of $neodash_hub_key
reports.query: MATCH (d:Document) WHERE $neodash_hub_key IN coalesce(d.topic_hubs, []) RETURN d.title AS title, d.category AS category, d.doc_type AS doc_type, d.reference_number AS ref, d.source_url AS url ORDER BY category, title LIMIT 200

reports.title: URL substring
reports.query: RETURN true

reports.title: Matching documents
reports.query: MATCH (d:Document) WHERE toLower(d.source_url) CONTAINS toLower($neodash_doc_url) RETURN d.title AS title, d.category AS category, d.doc_type AS doc_type, d.audience AS audience, d.site_topic AS site_topic, d.topic_path AS topic_path, d.source_url AS url LIMIT 10

reports.title: Links FROM the document
reports.query: MATCH (d:Document)-[r:LINKS_TO]->(t:Document) WHERE toLower(d.source_url) CONTAINS toLower($neodash_doc_url) RETURN r.anchor AS anchor, r.link_context AS context, coalesce(t.title, t.source_url) AS target, t.category AS category ORDER BY context LIMIT 100

reports.title: Links TO the document (with anchors)
reports.query: MATCH (a:Document)-[r:LINKS_TO]->(b:Document) WHERE toLower(b.source_url) CONTAINS toLower($neodash_doc_url) RETURN coalesce(a.title, a.source_url) AS source, r.anchor AS anchor, r.link_context AS context ORDER BY context LIMIT 100

reports.title: Link neighbourhood (graph)
reports.query: MATCH (d:Document) WHERE toLower(d.source_url) CONTAINS toLower($neodash_doc_url) WITH d LIMIT 1 MATCH p = (d)-[:LINKS_TO*1..2]-(:Document) RETURN p LIMIT 200
